# Version 4.150.0
> **New minor release** · Released July 7, 2026 · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/4.150.0) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v4.150.0)
> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](4.150.0/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.150.0 ships 10 product-facing changes across bug fixes and platform work.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this release.*

## Engine

- **Skia to milestone m150 (4.150.0)** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#4146](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4146))
- **Harfbuzz to 14.2.1** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#4167](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4167))
- **Merge upstream chrome/m150 bug fixes** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#4190](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4190))

## API Surface

- **SKColorFilter.CreateOverdraw() for overdraw visualization** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#4227](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4227))
- **SKImageFilter.CreateEmpty() method** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#4228](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4228))
- **SKImageFilter.CreateCrop()** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#4229](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4229))
- **SKPaint.GetFastBounds() for quick-reject culling** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#4271](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4271))

## Bug Fixes

- **Deprecated .NET Interactive (Polyglot Notebooks) support** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. ([#4186](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4186))
- **Promote remaining pre-v4 obsoletes to error and trim obsolete enums from the ref assembly** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#4195](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4195))
- **Perf(SKSurface): cache the Canvas wrapper across calls** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#4247](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4247))
- **Small-sigma raster blur regression (define SK_AVOID_SLOW_RASTER_PIPELINE_BLURS)** — Ships in this release; see the linked PR for the full change and rationale. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#4269](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4269))

## Release Candidate 1 (June 29, 2026)

Release Candidate 1 carried SKPaint.GetFastBounds() for quick-reject culling; small-sigma raster blur regression (define SK_AVOID_SLOW_RASTER_PIPELINE_BLURS); perf(SKSurface): cache the Canvas wrapper across calls; SKColorFilter.CreateOverdraw() for overdraw visualization; SKImageFilter.CreateCrop(); SKImageFilter.CreateEmpty() method; Merge upstream chrome/m150 bug fixes.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.150.0-preview.2.1...v4.150.0-rc.1.1)

## Preview 2 (June 24, 2026)

Preview 2 carried Promote remaining pre-v4 obsoletes to error and trim obsolete enums from the ref assembly; deprecated .NET Interactive (Polyglot Notebooks) support; harfbuzz to 14.2.1.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.150.0-preview.1.1...v4.150.0-preview.2.1)

## Preview 1 (June 13, 2026)

Preview 1 carried Skia to milestone m150 (4.150.0).

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.148.0...v4.150.0-preview.1.1)
